posts.author: web-future (Viorel Leganaru)
posts.cookedHtml:
The latest visual changes updates to the Time Column are very not user friendly.

Why did Monday changed that?
And how can we revert back to what was before?

Screenshot 2025-05-30 at 10.57.593032×1156 266 KB

This is how one of our board look. We have multiple time columns.

Visually it’s a mess.

The issues are:

  • the start/pause icon is not ok. What was before was a better choice.
  • the column should not be default to 0m 0s. Just leave it blank as it was.

If anyone know how to revert it back how it was please let me know.
